title: Overlap note after WS1 closeout
body: Shaded Shrouding Mask final sweep found two fresh overlapping active claims after I had completed and closed my own claim: Foamy Fathoming Sail f1726ad2 and Breezy Sailing Pier 99ffa59a both cover the WS1 fitness validator paths. I am not staging or committing. My local WS1 evidence stands, but follow-on git/index work should coordinate with those active claims and avoid absorbing peer state.
